title: Switch proxy service back to allorigins.win

requirements.text: Replace the current CORS proxy base URL with `https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=` (or equivalent allorigins.win endpoint) in useTabs.ts wherever proxy URLs are generated, so that all proxied tab navigation routes through allorigins.win.
acceptanceCriteria: Proxy URL construction in useTabs.ts uses allorigins.win as the proxy base.
Opening a URL in a tab produces an iframe src that begins with the allorigins.win endpoint.
No references to the previously used proxy service remain in useTabs.ts, HomeSearch.tsx, or TabContent.tsx.

requirements.text: Update any hardcoded proxy references in HomeSearch.tsx and TabContent.tsx to also use allorigins.win, ensuring the proxy status indicator and iframe src construction are consistent with the change in useTabs.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: HomeSearch.tsx renders the correct allorigins.win proxy URL in the address bar and iframe.
TabContent.tsx constructs iframe src URLs using allorigins.win.
ProxyInfoPanel or any proxy label text reflects allorigins.win as the active proxy.

constraints: Do not change the proxy-bypass logic that prevents proxy services from wrapping search engine queries.
nonGoals: Adding new proxy services or rotating between multiple proxies.
